# Change Requests

Use this folder when one Hermes agent needs a change in another agent's ownership scope.

File naming:

```text
{requesting-agent}-{YYYY-MM-DD}-{short-id}.md
```

Template:

```markdown
---
Requesting Agent: Alpha
Target Agent: Beta
Priority: Normal
Status: Open
---

## Request
Describe the exact change needed.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Criterion 1
- Criterion 2
```
